articles.title: bound British Airways flight diverted to Nagpur due to bad weather
articles.description: All passengers were safely deboarded, while the aircraft was parked at the Nagpur Airport owing to certain technical issues

articles.title: London-Hyderabad British Airways flight diverted to Nagpur, passengers deboarded
articles.description: A British Airways flight from London to Hyderabad was diverted to Nagpur early Tuesday due to bad weather and low visibility. Passengers were deboarded after landing at 5.30 am, while the aircraft remains grounded over technical issues.

articles.title: Hyderabad-bound British Airways flight diverted to Nagpur due to bad weather
articles.description: Nagpur, Feb 24 (PTI) A Hyderabad-bound British Airways flight from London was diverted to Nagpur airport early Tuesday due to bad weather, an official said. Passengers were deboarded from the aircraft, which remains grounded at Nagpur airport due to some technical issues, the official said. Speaking to PTI, the senior official said that a British […]
